title: Infrastructure as Code with Terraform
input_format: Infrastructure requirements including VPC CIDR, subnet count, instance types, and database configuration
output_format: Terraform HCL configuration for VPC, subnets, EC2 instances, RDS, and security groups
example_output: Terraform configuration with VPC, public/private subnets, NAT gateway, EC2 ASG, RDS, and security groups
constraints:
- Must use variables for all configurable values
- Must include proper tagging
- Must separate public and private subnets
- Must use security groups with least-privilege rules
- Must include outputs for key resource IDs
function_signature: function generateTerraformConfig(config: { region: string; vpcCidr: string; azCount: number; instanceType: string; dbEngine: string }): string
